no_data.title: Manage your request emails
no_data.description: Active email templates to start sending automated emails to customers.

banner_quota_used.title: You've used {{used}}% of your {{plan}} plan order quota
banner_quota_used.subtitle: A {{plan}} plan comes with only {{total}} orders/ month. Upgrade to send more emails.

banner.title: Customer reviews are powerful!
banner.content: A few sentences in a review can have more influence on consumers than an entire website. Get your customers reviews with our built-in email campaigns and templates to make your life easier!

campaign.email_content_description: Craft email content with tailored language to ensure your customers easily grasp the message
campaign.title: Email workflow
campaign.email_scheduling_subtitle: Customize time when email is sent to customers who comes from different geographical area
campaign.subject: Subject
campaign.active_require_toast: You need active trigger request review
campaign.call_to_action_btn: Call to action button (Write a review)

request_review.title: Request review
request_review.content: {{day}} day after a {{status}}, an automatic email will be sent to the customer, requesting them to leave a review of the product.

request_review_reminder.title: Request review reminder
request_review_reminder.content: After {{days}} days of sending the initial review request email, an automatic reminder email will be sent if no response is received. Be activated only after Review request email is on.

thank_you_for_review.title: Thank you for review
thank_you_for_review.content: After a customer leaves a review, an automatic thank-you email will be sent. Voucher codes and discounts can be added. Be activated only after Review request email is on.
thank_you_for_review.content_2: {{days}} days after a customer leaves a review, an automatic thank-you email will be sent. Voucher codes and discounts can be added. Be activated only after Review request email is on.

campaign.discount_description: Incentivize customers to leave a review by offering discount for their next purchase
campaign.email_queue_description: Send request emails for the orders not be sent automatically

request_review.subject: Happy purchasing {{PRODUCT_NAME}}? Leave a review now!
request_review.preview_text: Thank you for your recent purchase. We hope you love it! If you do, your review will be very meaningful to us

We want to check in and see how you are enjoying your shopping at {{STORE_NAME}}

If you have a moment, it would be great if you could share your thoughts and experiences with us and fellow shoppers. Your approval is everything 🤩.

request_review.subject: Happy purchasing {{PRODUCT_NAME}}? Leave a review now!
request_review.content:
Hello {{FIRST_NAME}}

We want to check in and see how you are enjoying your shopping at {{STORE_NAME}}

If you have a moment, it would be great if you could share your thoughts and experiences with us and fellow shoppers. Your approval is everything 🤩.

Warmly,

The {{STORE_NAME}} Team

request_review_reminder.subject: How was your experience? Let us know.
request_review_reminder.content: Thank you for your recent purchase. We hope you love it! If you do, your review will be very meaningful to us

thank_you_email.subject: Thank you for leaving a review!❤️
thank_you_email.content:
Hello {{FIRST_NAME}}

Hello Thanks for leaving a review of your latest purchase. We love hearing feedback and appreciate the time you took to share your experience with this item(s).

request_review.subject: Your Feedback Matters: Share Your Thoughts on {{PRODUCT_NAME}}
request_review.content:
Dear {{FIRST_NAME}}

We hope you're enjoying your recent purchase of {{PRODUCT_NAME}} from {{STORE_NAME}}. Your feedback is crucial in helping us improve our offerings and provide the best possible experience for all our customers.

We kindly invite you to share your thoughts on {{PRODUCT_NAME}} by leaving a review on our website. Your honest feedback is greatly appreciated.

Thank you for your time and continued support.

Sincerely,

The {{STORE_NAME}} Team

request_review_reminder.subject: Your Recent Experience with {{STORE_NAME}}
request_review_reminder.content:
Hi {{FIRST_NAME}}

Thanks for choosing {{STORE_NAME}}! We hope you're enjoying your recent purchase. Your opinion is valuable, and we'd appreciate it if you could take a moment to share your experience.

Best regards,

{{STORE_NAME}}

thank_you_email.subject: Review Received: Your Thoughts Matter!
thank_you_email.content:
Dear {{FIRST_NAME}}

Thank you for taking the time to submit a review of your recent purchase. Your feedback is valuable to us as we strive to continuously improve our products and services. We appreciate you sharing your insights.

request_review.subject: Unlock Exclusive Benefits! Share Your Review of {{PRODUCT_NAME}}
request_review.content:
Hi {{FIRST_NAME}}

Enjoying your new {{PRODUCT_NAME}} from {{STORE_NAME}}? We'd love to hear about it!

Sharing your honest review on our website helps others make informed decisions and could also unlock exclusive benefits for you, which is a special coupon on your next purchase!

It only takes a few minutes to leave a review, and it will make a big difference.

Click stars and share your thoughts today!

Thank,

The {{STORE_NAME}} Team

request_review_reminder.subject: Unlock Exclusive Benefits with Your Review!
request_review_reminder.content:
Hello {{FIRST_NAME}},

Your recent purchase from {{STORE_NAME}} means a lot to us! Share your thoughts, unlock exclusive benefits, and enjoy something special just for you.

Thanks for choosing {{STORE_NAME}}!

Warm regards,

{{STORE_NAME}}

thank_you_email.subject: Help Others Shop Smarter: Share Your Review Experience!
thank_you_email.content:
Hi {{FIRST_NAME}},

We appreciate you leaving a review of your recent purchase! Your insights are valuable to other shoppers, and we truly appreciate you taking the time to contribute to our community. By sharing your experience, you help others make informed decisions.

request_review.subject: We're Here to Help! Share Your Experience with {{PRODUCT_NAME}}
request_review.content:
Hello {{FIRST_NAME}}

We hope you're settling in nicely with your new {{PRODUCT_NAME}} from {{STORE_NAME}}.

Your review on our website not only helps others, but it also helps us ensure we're providing the best possible support for our customers.

Feel free to share any thoughts you have on {{PRODUCT_NAME}}, good or bad. We value your input and want to make sure you're completely satisfied.

If you have any questions or need assistance with your {{PRODUCT_NAME}}, please don't hesitate to reach out to our friendly customer service team.

We're always happy to help!

Warmly,

The {{STORE_NAME}} Team

request_review_reminder.subject: Your Opinion Matters to {{STORE_NAME}}
request_review_reminder.content:
Dear {{FIRST_NAME}},

We hope you're pleased with your recent purchase from {{STORE_NAME}}. Your feedback is important. Please take a moment to share your thoughts.

Thank you for being a valued customer of {{STORE_NAME}}.

Best regards,

{{STORE_NAME}}

thank_you_email.subject: We Saw Your Review!
thank_you_email.content:
Hi {{FIRST_NAME}},

We saw your review of your recent purchase and wanted to express our sincere thanks! Your feedback is important to us, as it helps us ensure we're providing the best possible experience for all our customers.

qr_code_setting.store_qr_code_description: Create and customize unique QR codes for your store, allowing customers to manage and review their orders with just a scan. Enhance your store's customer experience with fast and convenient QR code integration.

resync-helptext: The system will synchronize all your previous orders.
